description: The CircleAligner component is used to position a list of slots in a circle.

fields.AutoAddChildren: Controls whether slots below this component's slot in the hierarchy are automatically added to ``Items``
fields.AutoAddIgnoreTags: If a slot has a Tag matching one of the tags in this list, it will not be auto added to ``Items``
fields.Axis: The axis around which the slots will be aligned.
fields.Radius: The radius of the circle that the slots will be positioned on.
fields.Offset: Offsets the starting position of the circle.
fields.Arc: 360 by default. If smaller, the slots will only fill that section of a circle. Likewise, if it is larger than 360, the slots will wrap around the circle multiple times.
fields.FillWholeArc: If true, the last slot will be at the very end of the arch, otherwise there will be a gap after the last slots.
fields.RotationOffset: An offset, in degrees, that is applied to the rotation of the target slots.
fields.Items: The list of slots to be aligned.
